creator: me@nanaya.net
text:
If one has two different (or just one) php apps, one requiring imagick and the other requiring vips, it's impossible to have both running without resorting to ports* (or running own build server which don't make sense for a personal single server setup).

(I haven't tried actually installing them from ports because the last time I mixed ports and pkgs it resulted in a mess and way higher upkeep in term of maintenance)

# pkg install php80-pecl-vips php80-pecl-imagick-im7
